title: Food Chain Builder
subtitle: Producer, consumer, hunter, recycler
learning_goal: Build a simple food-chain set from observations that play different ecological roles.
intro: A food chain is a path through a larger food web. Build one from four real observations.
outro: You built a field-note food chain from real organisms, not a worksheet.

steps.hint: Plants are producers because they make food from sunlight.
Look on flowers and leaves for insects feeding or moving pollen.
Spiders, birds, frogs, lizards, and snakes all hunt other animals.
Decomposers return old plant and animal material to the soil.
